title: Hiteria Village
body:
# The Official Hiteria Village Modpack. Fabric 1.21.1

Do you like modded servers. Do you like servers that pay more attention towards fun. With no paid content. Do you hate waiting for updates? Then come join us at Hiteria Village.
This Modpack adds a nice title screen for the server. On top of having access to any updates as quickly as possible.

Eterna Village is long gone. But with the help of many of it's members we decided to bring it back to life in a new way. Here's to a new way to enjoy Eterna.

This modpack has AutoModPack included. All the mods should be automatically downloaded upon first join of the server.

> Discord Server - [https://discord.gg/yPcu2dRkth](https://discord.gg/yPcu2dRkth)
>
> Server IP - hiteriavillage.mine.bz 
>
> Server Wiki - https://hiteriavillage.fandom.com/wiki/Hiteria_Village_Wiki
## This Modpack Includes
- A Fully Custom Title Screen
- Quailty To Life Mods
- Performance Mods
- And More
